name: Budget Manager
short_desc: Self-hosted bill & budget manager with passkey sign-in.
description: Track recurring bills, splits, debts, and savings goals across pay periods, with a bill-pay mode and balance tracking. Single shared database on the host (PGlite), gated by WebAuthn passkeys (YubiKey).
author: Jonathan Barnes

form_fields.label: Public hostname (RP_ID)
form_fields.hint: The domain passkeys are bound to, e.g. budget.example.com

form_fields.label: Public origin (RP_ORIGIN)
form_fields.hint: Full URL incl. https, e.g. https://budget.example.com

form_fields.label: Registration secret
form_fields.hint: Set this to enroll a passkey, then clear it and update the app.
